code: import{createStore,combineReducers,applyMiddleware}from'redux';import{thunk}from'redux-thunk';import authReducer from'./auth/authReducer';import appReducer from'./app/appReducer';const rootReducer=combineReducers({auth:authReducer,app:appReducer});const store=createStore(rootReducer,applyMiddleware(thunk));export default store;
